title: ContentSpec
description: A canonical desired-content specification that describes a buildable or publishable unit before execution or release.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

name.description: Human-readable name of the content specification.

sourceRefs.description: Optional source refs such as git commits, OCI digests, or upstream artifact IDs.

labels.description: Human or machine labels for indexing and policy.

policyTags.description: Policy and governance tags relevant to this content.

targetSurfaces.description: Named surfaces where this content may be built, installed, published, or consumed.
